name: Proma
description: Proma brings a seamless general-purpose Agent experience to your workflow. Built for 100× professionals and the proactive Agent era, it supports Claude and Pi runtimes, Feishu group chats, and any LLM provider.
summaryZh: Proma brings a seamless general-purpose Agent experience to your workflow. Built for 100× professionals and the proactive Agent era, it supports Claude and Pi runtimes, Feishu group chats, and any LLM provider. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
